title: Safe Ride home update - June
description:
Hi this is similar to the other Safe ride home tasks we had.
https://www.hauptman-obrien.net/safe-ride-home/ 

Shelby is sending through the next safe ride home campaign early to be prepared for her maternity leave. 

Requirements: We'll need a task or reminder for the changes going live on "Friday, June 12th at 6PM and expire on Monday, June 22nd at midnight"

1. Update banner image


2. Update yellow banner portion on SRH page: 
  • Current:  No current Safe Ride Home® events. Please check this page periodically as we are always adding new events. 
  •  Temporarily change to: Celebrate safely! Grab your Safe Ride Home® Uber voucher today—ready to use June 12th through 22nd 

3. Update Uber info:
  • Uber Voucher Link:  https://r.uber.com/RVSLNLXLYNJ  
  • Voucher Redemption Guide Link: https://www.uber.com/us/en/business/products/vouchers/how-to-use/ 
Client info:
Just as we’ve done in the past, we’ll need to add the form back to the Safe Ride Home® page. This form will require visitors to input their name, phone number, and email address. After submitting, the voucher will be sent to their email. I’ve also attached the email format they will receive with the Uber voucher link attached (https://r.uber.com/RVSLNLXLYNJ).
4. Please do another pop-up on the home page in the area below.
  • Use message: Hey Baseball Fans! Claim your Safe Ride Home®!  

Client info: Additionally, we would like to create a pop-up in the circled area to promote the campaign, allowing visitors to click and be directed straight to the SRH page. Pop-up should show the message “Hey Baseball Fans! Claim your Safe Ride Home®!”.

5. Email format for voucher delivery:
https://hauptmanobrien.sharepoint.com/:w:/s/CloudDocs/IQDNVSCpF7tpRaj28aY-OSDPASv06cX1vxoD7jIfNaUUcp0

*Please let us know if there are still some info needed so we can seek help from their Account Manager. Thanks much!

title: Re-integrate CallRail with Lead Docket
assignees: Barnes, Keith Bruss, Matthew Nyahari, Predrag
description:
Domain: hauptman-obrien.net
Summary: The client has reported that their CallRail account was deactivated and removed from Lead Docket, resulting in the deletion of all recorded calls and historical data. The client is requesting that CallRail be re-integrated with Lead Docket using the integration details available within Lead Docket. The client has also provided a support article from Lead Docket as a reference.
Client Goal: Restore the CallRail and Lead Docket integration so that call tracking data flows correctly into Lead Docket going forward.
Requirements for Completion:
  • CallRail is successfully re-integrated with Lead Docket
  • Integration is configured using the integration details available within Lead Docket
  • Call data from CallRail populates correctly in Lead Docket following re-integration
  • Integration is tested and confirmed functional before closing the ticket
Assets and References:
  • Lead Docket CallRail integration guide: https://support.leaddocket.com/hc/en-us/articles/360045475872-Integrating-CallRail

title: Ride Home update
description:
Hi this is similar to the other Safe ride home tasks we had.
 https://www.hauptman-obrien.net/safe-ride-home/ 

Hauptman O'Brien has their safe ride home campaign and needs updates made to the safe ride home page. Predrag may be best to tag in for this, as he's helped with the previous safe ride home campaign. 

Deadline: changes live March 11th, changes taken down March 18th
 
Direct from client:
As you know, we will be offering our Safe Ride Home? program for St. Patrick’s Day weekend, and we will need some temporary updates to the Safe Ride Home? page on the website. Attached, you’ll find the temporary banner we would like to use.
 
The campaign will go live on Saturday, March 14th at Noon and expire on Wednesday, March 18th at 12:00 AM, with vouchers worth $35. If we can aim to have this page live by Wednesday, March 11th, that would be ideal. Although the campaign doesn’t officially start until Saturday, this will give the community a chance to start claiming vouchers early and allow us to resolve any potential issues before it goes live. The page can return to default setting on Wednesday, March 18th.
 
1. Update banner image


2. Update yellow banner portion on SRH page:
  • Current: No current Safe Ride Home® events. Please check this page periodically as we are always adding new events.
  • Temporarily change to: pending still waiting for AM response, I'll add the info when available.
    Update please use this: Celebrate safely! Grab your Safe Ride Home® Uber voucher today—ready to use March 14th through 18th!
3. Update Uber info:
  • Uber Voucher Link: https://r.uber.com/RJZXURPGXTD   
  • Voucher Redemption Guide Link: https://www.uber.com/us/en/business/products/vouchers/how-to-use/ 
Client info:
Just as we’ve done in the past, we’ll need to add the form back to the Safe Ride Home? page. This form will require visitors to input their name, phone number, and email address. After submitting, the voucher will be sent to their email. I’ve also attached the email format they will receive with the Uber voucher link attached (https://r.uber.com/RJZXURPGXTD).

4. Please do another pop-up on the home page in the area below.

 
Client info: Additionally, we would like to create a pop-up in the circled area to promote the campaign, allowing visitors to click and be directed straight to the SRH page. If possible, it would be great to make the pop-up green to give it a festive touch, with the message “Claim your Safe Ride Home?” displayed.

5. Email format for voucher delivery:

*Please let us know if there are still some info needed so we can seek help from their Account Manager. Thanks much!

title: Add new member - Daniel Hartnett
description:
Please add their new member on the site.
https://www.hauptman-obrien.net/attorneys/

Where to add:  He can be added to the bottom of the attorney page right before Tim J. O’Brien.



Bio:
A native of northeast Nebraska, Daniel Hartnett was born in Sioux City, Iowa in 1956 and raised on his family’s farm near Hubbard, Nebraska. He earned his undergraduate degree in 1978 and his Juris Doctor in 1981 from the University of Nebraska–Lincoln. Dan was admitted to the Nebraska and Iowa state bars in 1981 and later to the South Dakota bar, and is admitted to practice before all state and federal courts in Nebraska, Iowa, and South Dakota. Prior to joining Hauptman, O’Brien, Wolf & Lathrop, Dan practiced law for 42 years with Crary, Huff, Ringenberg, Hartnett & Storm, PC in Sioux City, Iowa, where his practice focused exclusively on civil litigation.
 
Bar Admissions
  • Nebraska
  • Iowa
  • South Dakota
  • All State and Federal Courts in Nebraska, Iowa, and South Dakota
 
Professional Associations and Memberships
  • Nebraska Association of Trial Attorneys
  • Nebraska State Bar Association, House of Delegates
  • Iowa State Bar Association, Board of Governors
 
Education
  • Juris Doctor, University of Nebraska–Lincoln, 1981
  • Bachelor’s Degree, University of Nebraska–Lincoln, 1978
 
Employment History
  • Hauptman, O’Brien, Wolf & Lathrop – Senior Attorney
  • Crary, Huff, Ringenberg, Hartnett & Storm, PC – Partner, Managing Partner, Chair of Civil Litigation Department (42 years)
 
Image:


Thanks much!

title: Safe Ride Home & Creighton Men’s Basketball
description:
Seeking help update their Safe Ride Homepage please.
URL: https://www.hauptman-obrien.net/safe-ride-home/

Note: They need the updates to the Safe Ride Home page done by  November 5th and to be taken down and set back on  January 1st or January 2nd


Setting up the due date for QA/QC will change after.

Info from the client:
 "We finalized an incredible partnership: we’re sponsoring Creighton Men’s Basketball this season! During November and December, they’ll be helping promote our Safe Ride Home® program. This is massive for us, and we couldn’t be more excited!

Normally, the Safe Ride Home® page wouldn’t go live until a few days before the vouchers activate, but since Creighton’s first game is November 5, we’ll need the page live by then. The program itself will run from Friday, December 12 through New Year’s Day.

It’ll be the same general setup as in years past with a few tweaks — but here’s everything we’ll need specifically:
1. Update banner image


2. Update yellow banner portion on SRH page:
  • Current: "No current Safe Ride Home® Events. Please check this page periodically as we are always adding new events. 
  • Temporarily change to:  "Celebrate safely! Grab your Safe Ride Home® Uber voucher today—ready to use December 12th through New Years Eve!" (in a font maybe a couple sizes bigger than what's pictured) 


3. Update Uber info:
  • Uber Voucher Link: https://r.uber.com/RPGHPWFGFKU
  • Voucher Redemption Guide Link: https://www.uber.com/us/en/business/products/vouchers/how-to-use/ 
Client info:  
"Just as we’ve done in the past, we’ll need to add the form back to the Safe Ride Home® page. This form will require visitors to input their name, phone number, and email address. After submitting, the voucher will be sent to their email. I’ve also attached the email format. The links for both the Voucher Redemption Guide and Uber Voucher Link are included on the email format but I have them below for you as well."


4. Please do another pop-up on the home page in the area below.


- text to use: I cannot add the emojis as is but please make it look like this:

Ride safe this holiday!
Claim your Safe Ride Home® Uber voucher — valid Dec 13–New Years Eve


5. Email format for voucher delivery:


*Please let us know if there are still some info needed so we can seek help from their Account Manager. Thanks much!

Tagging for visibility.

Thank you very much.

title: Add new Attorney: Kathryn Hartnett
description:
Kathryn Hartnett

**Please add her to the website, right after Kyle McGinn on the Attorneys page. She goes by "Kate", but her listing and header should be under Kathryn Hartnett.

Bio:
Kate is a proud Nebraskan and was raised in South Sioux City, Nebraska. She grew up running around the halls of her father’s law firm. From a young age, Kate knew that she would be an attorney.
 
Kate graduated from the University of Iowa in 2007, earning a Bachelor of Arts degree. She then earned her Juris Doctor from Creighton University School of Law in 2010.  
 
Kate has been practicing law in Iowa and Nebraska at the state and federal level since 2010. Prior to 2016, Kate handled personal injury, premises liability, title, and catastrophic construction defect claims.
 
As an attorney at Hauptman O’Brien, Kate specializes in workers’ compensation and personal injury claims across Iowa and Nebraska. Kate has given in-depth presentations on workers’ compensation law at the Nebraska Workers’ Compensation Symposium and the National Association of Subrogation Professionals annual meeting.
 
When she is not at the office, Kate enjoys swimming laps, reading, cooking, honing her trivia skills, being a founding member of the Omaha Food Club, and spending time with her husband and two sons.
 
 
Kate in the Community:
 
Kate is a passionate advocate for social justice and political activism. With a keen interest in politics, she actively seeks to contribute to causes that support what is right and just. Kate also finds joy in organizing and contributing to various food and toy drives, aiming to help those in need and spread joy to those less fortunate. She is deeply committed to setting a good example for her two sons, demonstrating the importance of giving back and standing up for what is right.
 
Bar Admissions:
 
Nebraska
Iowa 
U.S. District Court, District of Nebraska
U.S. District Court for the Southern District of Iowa
 
Professional Associations and Memberships:
 
Nebraska State Bar Association
Iowa State Bar Association
Iowa Association of Workers' Compensation Lawyers
 
Education:
 
University of Iowa, 2007
Bachelor of Arts, English
 
Creighton University School of Law, 2010
Juris Doctor
Honors: CALI Award for Trial Practice; CALI Award for Bioethics and the Law
 
Areas of Practice:  (Each linked to the webpage, just like the others)
 
  • Car Accident Injuries
  • Truck Accident Injuries
  • Motorcycle Accidents
  • Boat Accident Injuries
  • Pedestrian Accident Injuries
  • Catastrophic Injuries
  • Workplace Injuries
  • Slip & Fall Accident Injuries
  • Animal Bite Injuries
  • Faulty Products Injuries
  • Long-Term Disability
  • Brain Injuries
  • Burn Injuries
  • Spinal Cord Injuries
  • Medical Malpractice
  • Wrongful Death

They’ve sent over a request from CallRail to have us help with. I’ve added a ss of the email and then the text for the codes provided. 


Hello!

I need help placing a piece of code on the site for Hauptman Obrien Wolf & Lathrop. CallRail has included instructions for different methods below. Choose the one that applies to our site. Thanks!


INSTALLATION METHOD 1
WordPress Plugin

Add this plugin key to your CallRail plugin in WordPress. View instructionsPlugin Key: 904995913

 

INSTALLATION METHOD 2
JavaScript

Paste the code below just before the closing </body> tag of every page on the website. View instructions

<script type="text/javascript" src="//cdn.callrail.com/companies/904995913/61e0d59fbea39838e4f0/12/swap.js"></script>

 

INSTALLATION METHOD 3
Google Tag Manager

Copy and paste the script into the Custom HTML section in Google Tag Manager. View instructions

<script type="text/javascript" src="//cdn.callrail.com/companies/904995913/61e0d59fbea39838e4f0/12/swap.js"></script>

 

INSTALLATION METHOD 4
Wix Plugin

Copy and paste the script below into the Custom Code section for your Wix site. View instructions

<script type="text/javascript" src="//cdn.callrail.com/companies/904995913/61e0d59fbea39838e4f0/12/swap.js"></script>

 
Looking for more information? See our support article.

title: Uptick in pedestrian deaths/injuries. potential content angle
description: On the most recent call, Dave mentioned recent increases in pedestrian accidents. Corey wanted a note made that this could be a potential content opportunity, with research to be conducted, and attempts to get media pitches and backlinks.

title: Really concerning trends
assignees: Andrei Pocol, Clayton Coombs, Mubeen Dildar-Mia
description:
This site, up until last August was one of our strongest organic performers. It's been steadily declining month over month. Thankfully, we still have maps rankings.

However, that's not sufficient. We need this trend reversed. Whatever has been being done since August isn't working. Also it's worth noting that the organic declines are happening in BrightLocal rank tracker to. So this isn't merely an Ahrefs issue.

Lastly, I do not want to hear about AI Overviews and AI zero click results etc.

Look at the AI Citations for this client in this same screenshot.

I am assuming that photo is of Lincoln City, OR.  They used to just be little maps for each location, and we were okay with that.

title: GBP Photos Situation
description:
CC: ,

It appears that Council Bluffs GBP's images were removed at some point during the reinstatement. I'm not sure exactly when or how, but this is quite strange.

I know Brenda mentioned this, but I'm having trouble locating the email.

I think this is a great opportunity for us to reach out and have them supply us with images for Council Bluffs, but also for each GBP.

Would you please assist ?

Also, , I know we discussed having Brenda supply us with images of the office for Lincoln. Did she ever send them? As it seems she just went ahead and uploaded it to the GBP herself, which I guess is fine. 

However, I strongly advise us having the clients get used to sending us these items for approval first, before just taking action on their own behalf. We need to review them before they go live/are used on the GBP, or wherever, to ensure compliance and accuracy.

title: Council Bluffs GBP Suspension
description:
,

Council Bluffs has been suspended, and we need to initiate the reinstatement process ASAP.

Before I can begin, I will need your help with the following, please.

1 - Make CLIXSY an OWNER of the Council Bluffs GBP - in order for us to invite our GBP vendor to it

2 - Start gathering the documentation/evidence EARLY - in order to have this as soon as possible when it is needed.
- INFO on what is needed can be found inside this How-To form

I am sending the pre-assessment form now to get things rolling.

As per 's direction, we need to move on this quickly and stay proactive to show the client that we’re on top of it. 

Let’s ensure that if any delays occur, they come only from the client’s side — demonstrating that we’re being responsive, diligent, and consistently following up to keep things moving forward. 

Please let me know if you need anything else from my end.

title: Are we able to update the site's locations' NAP like Mike Morse's?
description:
Hey ,

Spoke with Clayton and have a few items to discuss with you guys.

Firstly, the site footer:
Would it be possible to set up Hauptman O'Brien's locations in the footer, exactly like Mike Morse's?

LOCATION NAME
BRAND
By Appointment Only
ADDRESS
PHONE NUMBER

The linking of said NAP is formatted/grouped as follows:
- Location name is linked to the location landing page
- Brand name and appointment text underneath it are linked to the location landing page
- Address is linked to the location landing page
- Phone number linked tel:number

We need to ensure we add the text "By Appointment Only" for the Satellite offices, as this is how Mike's is set up. please confirm, if we want all locations to have this text or just satellite offices.
 
EX-
MIKE - https://www.855mikewins.com/personal-injury-lawyers-in-grand-rapids-mi/
HAUPTMAN - https://www.hauptman-obrien.net/council-bluffs/

Secondly, the locations' landing pages:
Set up the map embed NAP section identically to Mike Morse's landing pages.

We would like to add the location's map embed, formatted as Mike's, to each location's respective landing page. Currently, we do not have map embeds on the location pages for Hauptman. 

Only the phone number is linked to its tel:number for the location page's map embed.
